title: OurDiscount
description: This mod allows a villager's discount to be shared with all players on the server.
body:
[![Fabric API](https://github.com/intergrav/devins-badges/blob/v3/assets/compact/requires/fabric-api_46h.png?raw=true)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [![Fabric API](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b114b346f60f5a67d81e5330b470aed87323e070.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)

How it works:

When a player joins, they are automatically added to the mod's database (config/ourdiscount_players.txt).

When someone interacts with a cured villager, the discount is applied to everyone in that database.

Offline support: Unlike older versions, the original player does not need to be online. Since we store the UUIDs, friends who are offline (or haven't joined yet) will still get the discount.

Great for SMPs to avoid repetitive curing for every single member.

Commands (Console only):

/ourdiscount check <name> - Checks if a player has a discount active on nearby villagers (works for offline players too).

/ourdiscount reapply - Forces the discount update on all loaded villagers globally.

Discord: lukysgaming
